_README: Suppression list for remarque-audit's --src source-scan false positives (font-floor / hardcoded-color / oklch-literal) — NOT the --palette contrast/gamut checks, which always run and are never suppressed (see scripts/run-remarque-audit.mjs). EMPTY as of 2026-07-23: remarque-tokens 0.8.0's source scan (this site bumped to it in #345) fixed the over-aggressive checks that produced all 216 prior entries under remarque-audit@0.5.0 — it now strips comments and correctly recognizes this site's token files, so it emits ZERO source-scan findings against the current CSS (verified: a probe with a real hardcoded hex / sub-13px font / stray oklch literal is still correctly caught, so the scan works — the clean result is genuine, not a silently-disabled gate; #375). The fail-closed mechanism is retained: any future real source-scan finding hits an empty baseline and fails the build, requiring hand review before it may be added back. Entries are exact (file, line, category) matches. See astro-site/DESIGN-DEVIATIONS.md #6.
